category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Chile SEC certification and Ministry of Energy efficiency labelling requirements.

title.en: China-to-Chile Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Chile's SEC mandatory certification, NCh IEC 60335-2-24 safety standard, Ministry of Energy efficiency labelling, and R-600a refrigerant requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与智利SEC强制认证、NCh IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、能源部能效标识及R-600a制冷剂要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與智利SEC強制認證、NCh IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、能源部能效標識及R-600a製冷劑要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SEC approval, customs determination, or market-access guarantee. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Chilean SEC protocols, NCh standards, Ministry of Energy efficiency-labelling rules, and refrigerant provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SEC批准、海关裁定或市场准入保证。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行智利SEC程序、NCh标准、能源部能效标识规则及制冷剂条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SEC批准、海關裁定或市場准入保證。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行智利SEC程序、NCh標準、能源部能效標識規則及製冷劑條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four main Chilean compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety must be SEC-certified to NCh IEC 60335-2-24 through an SEC-authorised certifier — Chinese CCC / GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted; (2) energy efficiency labelling under the Ministry of Energy / SEC programme requires a Chilean efficiency-class label distinct from China's GB 12021.2 grade; (3) Chile relies on a designated local importer as the responsible party who registers products and holds SEC approvals — there is no EU-style authorised-representative statute but a Chilean RUT-registered importer is required in practice; and (4) R-600a refrigerant is widely accepted in Chile, so this is largely a documentation rather than a technology gap. Chile shares China's 50 Hz / 220 V single-phase nominal grid, which eases voltage-related re-design but does not remove the SEC certification obligation. Chile has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime for refrigerators.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四项主要智利合规差距：（1）电气安全须通过SEC授权认证机构按NCh IEC 60335-2-24取得SEC认证——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受；（2）能源部/SEC项下的能效标识要求使用与中国GB 12021.2等级不同的智利能效等级标签；（3）智利依靠指定本地进口商作为责任方负责产品登记并持有SEC批准——虽无类EU授权代表法定制度，但实务中须有在智利注册RUT的进口商；（4）R-600a制冷剂在智利被广泛接受，因此这主要是文件而非技术差距。智利与中国同为50 Hz/220 V单相标称电网，有利于减少与电压相关的重新设计，但并不免除SEC认证义务。智利对电冰箱没有类EU的横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声法规。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四項主要智利合規差距：（1）電氣安全須通過SEC授權認證機構按NCh IEC 60335-2-24取得SEC認證——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受；（2）能源部/SEC項下的能效標識要求使用與中國GB 12021.2等級不同的智利能效等級標籤；（3）智利依靠指定本地進口商作為責任方負責產品登記並持有SEC批准——雖無類EU授權代表法定制度，但實務中須有在智利註冊RUT的進口商；（4）R-600a製冷劑在智利被廣泛接受，因此這主要是文件而非技術差距。智利與中國同為50 Hz/220 V單相標稱電網，有利於減少與電壓相關的重新設計，但並不免除SEC認證義務。智利對電冰箱沒有類EU的橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲法規。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official Chilean regulator (SEC, Ministry of Energy), INN standards body, or primary legal sources preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
